---
title: "R / Quarto Learning Project"
author: "John NG"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
editor: visual
---

---
title: "R / Quarto Learning Project"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
---

# Welcome

This website presents my learning work with **R**, **RStudio**, **Quarto**, **Git**, and **GitHub**.

The goal of this project is to learn how to build **reproducible and well-documented data analysis workflows**.

## Main document

-   [Guide des bonnes pratiques en R](docs/Bonnes_pratiques_en_R.qmd)

## Technologies used

-   R
-   RStudio
-   Quarto
-   Git
-   GitHub
